top_gaps.why: Every target role expects hands-on experience adapting pretrained models.
The most-mentioned framework across all targets and you only have basic exposure.
Scaling training across GPUs is table stakes for AI engineering roles.

projects.title: Fine-tune a small LLM on your own dataset
projects.description: Take an open 1-3B parameter model and LoRA fine-tune it on a domain dataset you scrape yourself. Publish a before/after eval and a short write-up. This proves you can run the full fine-tuning loop end to end.

projects.title: Reimplement a paper's model in PyTorch from scratch
projects.description: Pick a small vision or NLP paper and reimplement its model and training loop in raw PyTorch, matching the reported metrics on a subset. Demonstrates real framework fluency beyond tutorials.

projects.title: Multi-GPU training demo with DDP
projects.description: Adapt an existing training script to run under PyTorch DistributedDataParallel on a rented multi-GPU box and document the throughput scaling. Shows you can move past single-GPU work.
